item.title: CHICKEN PARM SANDWICH ­¤ź¢ Ingredients For the chicken cutlets:Ō...
item.description:
View on TikTok


CHICKEN PARM SANDWICH ­¤ź¢ Ingredients For the chicken cutlets:ŌĆ©2 boneless and skinless chicken breasts┬Ā┬Ā Kosher salt┬Ā┬Ā Freshly ground black pepper┬Ā┬Ā ┬Į cup all-purpose flour┬Ā┬Ā 2 eggs┬Ā┬Ā ┬Į cup panko breadcrumbs + ┬Į cup Italian finely ground breadcrumbs┬Ā┬Ā Ōģō cup finely grated Parmesan┬Ā┬Ā A few good glugs of olive oil and/or neutral oil for frying┬Ā┬Ā Ōģō cup potato starch┬Ā┬Ā ┬Į tablespoon garlic powder┬Ā┬Ā ┬Į tablespoon onion powder┬Ā┬Ā ┬Į tbs dried thyme For the tomato sauce: 3-4 tablespoons of olive oilŌĆ©2 garlic cloves, smashedŌĆ©1 (28 oz) can San Marzano tomatoesŌĆ©SaltŌĆ©Freshly ground black pepperŌĆ©Optional: 1ŌĆō2 teaspoons Calabrian chili paste or chopped Calabrian chilis For the tomato-garlic confit:ŌĆ©1 pint of small tomatoes (such as cherry, grape, campari, datterini, or sun gold)ŌĆ©1 head garlicŌĆ©┬Š cup olive oilŌĆ©Kosher salt For the pesto:ŌĆ©1 big old bunch of basilŌĆ©2-3 garlic clovesŌĆ©┬╝ c pine nuts ŌĆ©Ōģō cup grated Parmigiano ReggianoŌĆ©┬╝ cup extra virgin olive oilŌĆ©Salt┬Ā For the sandwich assembly:ŌĆ©Bread of choiceŌĆ©Fresh mozzarellaŌĆ©Extra Parmesan for topping Full recipe can be found on my substack, link in bio!
#chickenparm #sandwich #cooking

item.title: LAHMACUN Full recipe is on my substack link in bio! Ingredient...
item.description:
View on TikTok


LAHMACUN Full recipe is on my substack link in bio! Ingredients For the dough: All-purpose flour Salt Sugar Instant yeast Warm water Olive oil (optional) For the topping: Ground lamb or beef (or a combination of the two) Onion Garlic Tomato Red bell pepper or Turkish sweet pepper Flat-leaf parsley Tomato paste Red pepper paste (biber sal├¦as─▒) Paprika Cumin Aleppo pepper (optional) Salt Black pepper Sumac onion topping: Red onion Tomatoes Fresh parsley Lemon juice
#summer #outdoorcooking #turkish #lahmacun

item.title: ROPA VIEJA ­¤ć©­¤ć║ INGREDIENTS For the meat: -Flank or hanger s...
item.description:
View on TikTok


ROPA VIEJA ­¤ć©­¤ć║ INGREDIENTS For the meat: -Flank or hanger steak -Red and green bell peppers -Onion -Tomato paste -Canned diced tomatoes -Salt -Black pepper -Cumin -Oregano -Smoked paprika -Dry white wine -Green olives (+ a little brine) -Cilantro -Bay leaf -Beef or vegetable stock ŌĆ©For the black beans: -Black beans -Onion -Green bell pepper -Garlic -Salt -Cumin -Oregano -Bay leaf -Red wine vinegar For the plantains: -Fresh plantains -Neutral frying oil (I used avocado) -Salt (optional) For the rice: -Jasmine Rice -Salt -Onion -Red bell pepper *For the rice, I add a few large pieces of onion and bell pepper to infuse the flavor and then remove after cooking
#ropavieja #cubanfood #cooking #summer

item.title: FISH AND CHIPS ­¤É¤­¤ć¼­¤ć¦ Ingredients For the fish: -Cod or ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


FISH AND CHIPS ­¤É¤­¤ć¼­¤ć¦ Ingredients For the fish: -Cod or haddock -AP Flour -Salt -Black pepper -Neutral frying oil For the batter: -AP Flour -Potato starch -Baking powder -Salt -Paprika -Cayenne (optional) -Cold Beer (Pale ale, lager, or sparkling water) -Pinch of malt vinegar For the chips/fries: -Russet potatoes -Salt -Vinegar (optional during soaking) -Neutral frying oil (or other fat) -Malt vinegar For the tartar sauce: -Mayonnaise -Shallot -Parsley -Dill -Pickles / cornichons -Capers -Lemon juice -Dijon mustard For the peas: -Green peas -Butter -Salt -Black pepper -Fresh mint -Lemon juice
#cooking #fishandchips #summer #tennis #yonex

item.title: Friends coming over last minute = ChefŌĆÖs CounterŌäó Carne Asa...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Friends coming over last minute = ChefŌĆÖs CounterŌäó Carne Asada from ! Their marinated meats allows me to throw together a chef-driven meal in no time. Already marinated and grill-ready, with marinades like Chef's CounterŌäó Carne Asada, Chef's CounterŌäó Lemon Peppercorn Chicken Breast, Chef's CounterŌäó Italian-Style Chicken Breast, Chef's CounterŌäó Mesquite Pork Chop, Chef's CounterŌäó Chimichurri Pork Medallions, Chef's CounterŌäó Balsamic Peppercorn Beef Tips, Chef's CounterŌäó Tangy Orange Chicken Strips, and Chef's CounterŌäó Cilantro Lime Chicken Thigh. Shop ChefŌĆÖs Counter at your local Albertsons Companies grocery store, including Albertsons, Safeway, Jewel-Osco, and more!
#ChefsCounterPartner @Albertsons #ChefsCounterInspired #ad

item.title: SUPPL├ī AL TELEFONO ­¤ć«­¤ć╣ Ingredients For the rice: -Arborio...
item.description:
View on TikTok


SUPPL├ī AL TELEFONO ­¤ć«­¤ć╣ Ingredients For the rice: -Arborio or Carnaroli rice -Chicken, beef, or vegetable stock (I used chicken) -Tomato passata -Onion -Parmigiano Reggiano -Butter -Salt -Black pepper For the Filling: -Mozzarella or Scamorza For the Breading: -Eggs -Fine breadcrumbs (seasoned with salt) For Frying: -Neutral oil
#cooking #rome #streetfood #italy

item.title: Onion Bhajia ­¤¦ģ­¤ć«­¤ć│ Also known as Pakora! This is now one...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Onion Bhajia ­¤¦ģ­¤ć«­¤ć│ Also known as Pakora! This is now one of my new favorite snacks Ingredients -2 to 3 red onions -1 to 2 tsp salt (for drawing out moisture) plus for seasoning later on -1 cup besan flour (can use chickpea flour) -3 tbs of rice flour -Fresh cilantro -1 to 2 green chiles (Indian green chili or Thai chili are best) -Knob of freshFresh ginger -3 garlic cloves -Cumin seeds -Carom seeds (or fennel seeds) -1 tsp Turmeric powder -┬Į tsp Kashmiri or red chili powder -1 tsp Ground coriander -1 tsp Garam masala To fry: neutral oil such as sunflower or avocado with a high smoke point Ideally around 340┬░F or 171┬░C Enjoy!
#cooking #indianfood #snacks #summerrecipes

item.description:
View on TikTok


PASTA ALLA ZOZZONA Ingredients -Guanciale -Italian sausage -Onion -Egg yolks -San Marzano tomatoes -Pecorino Romano -Rigatoni or Mezze Maniche -Dry white wine -Salt -Black pepper -Pepperoncino (optional for heat)
#cooking #zozzona #pasta #summer #recipe
